query_normalized: bayesian nonparametrics for anomaly detection in time series computational statistics
rationale: This paper qualifies under category (d) as a foundational methodological critique and category (a) as it addresses the core mechanism of Bayesian Nonparametrics, which is the primary subject of the user's query.
